title: Plan and implement infrastructure improvements
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and implement infrastructure improvements demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine the improvement to be carried out

pcs.text: Discuss possible improvements for the planning period with the relevant stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discuss possible improvements for the planning period with the relevant stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss possible improvements for the planning period with the relevant stakeholders.

pcs.text: Prioritise improvements and plan schedules in line with property management and strategic plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prioritise improvements and plan schedules in line with property management and strategic plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prioritise improvements and plan schedules in line with property management and strategic plans.

pcs.text: Make allocations from the available budget for the planned improvements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make allocations from the available budget for the planned improvements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make allocations from the available budget for the planned improvements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine the improvement to be carried out

elements.title: Arrange the design of the improvement

pcs.text: Investigate designs for planned improvement, taking site features into account
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Investigate designs for planned improvement, taking site features into account?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Investigate designs for planned improvement, taking site features into account.

pcs.text: Formulate improvement plan, specifying location and dimensions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Formulate improvement plan, specifying location and dimensions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Formulate improvement plan, specifying location and dimensions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Arrange the design of the improvement

elements.title: Plan materials for property improvement

pcs.text: Calculate materials required for the construction of the improvement from the drawn plans, and discuss with relevant stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate materials required for the construction of the improvement from the drawn plans, and discuss with relevant stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate materials required for the construction of the improvement from the drawn plans, and discuss with relevant stakeholders.

pcs.text: Obtain quotes from suppliers for the materials, and prepare proposed budget
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain quotes from suppliers for the materials, and prepare proposed budget?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain quotes from suppliers for the materials, and prepare proposed budget.

pcs.text: Seek approval from management to go ahead with property improvement, based on plans and return on investment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek approval from management to go ahead with property improvement, based on plans and return on investment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek approval from management to go ahead with property improvement, based on plans and return on investment.

pcs.text: Select suitable suppliers based on value for money and quality of service
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select suitable suppliers based on value for money and quality of service?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select suitable suppliers based on value for money and quality of service.

pcs.text: Place orders with the chosen suppliers for the quantities, sizes and types of materials required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place orders with the chosen suppliers for the quantities, sizes and types of materials required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place orders with the chosen suppliers for the quantities, sizes and types of materials required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Plan materials for property improvement

elements.title: Prepare site for installation

pcs.text: Inspect site, and note key features for the planned property improvement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect site, and note key features for the planned property improvement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect site, and note key features for the planned property improvement.

pcs.text: Inform all relevant stakeholders of the proposed activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform all relevant stakeholders of the proposed activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform all relevant stakeholders of the proposed activities.

pcs.text: Measure and peg selected site according to the prepared plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure and peg selected site according to the prepared plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure and peg selected site according to the prepared plans.

pcs.text: Prepare the site to be ready for the improvement, and take precautions to ensure that adverse environmental impacts are eliminated or minimised
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare the site to be ready for the improvement, and take precautions to ensure that adverse environmental impacts are eliminated or minimised?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare the site to be ready for the improvement, and take precautions to ensure that adverse environmental impacts are eliminated or minimised.

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety hazards and take responsible action to minimise risks throughout the work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety hazards and take responsible action to minimise risks throughout the work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety hazards and take responsible action to minimise risks throughout the work.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Prepare site for installation

elements.title: Supervise implementation of property improvement

pcs.text: Obtain all materials required for each work period and ensure they are on site ready for implementation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain all materials required for each work period and ensure they are on site ready for implementation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain all materials required for each work period and ensure they are on site ready for implementation.

pcs.text: Implement property improvement according to the plans and prepared schedules
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement property improvement according to the plans and prepared schedules?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement property improvement according to the plans and prepared schedules.

pcs.text: Monitor work to minimise adverse environmental impacts and work health and safety risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor work to minimise adverse environmental impacts and work health and safety risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor work to minimise adverse environmental impacts and work health and safety risks.

pcs.text: Maintain communication with those working at the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain communication with those working at the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain communication with those working at the site.

pcs.text: Check the work regularly to ensure it complies with the work plans
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the work regularly to ensure it complies with the work plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the work regularly to ensure it complies with the work plans.

pcs.text: Dispose of any waste material responsibly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of any waste material responsibly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of any waste material responsibly.

pcs.text: Take corrective action where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take corrective action where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take corrective action where required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Supervise implementation of property improvement
